title: Noakes, Lucy - Press Secretary, No.10 - ACOBA advice
body: "Ms Noakes left her role at No.10 in May 2024  Head of Communications, Helsing Limited Ms Noakes sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Helsing Limited. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in July 2025; and the appointment was taken up in August 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
